title: Oil prices fall below $100 as Trump insists ceasefire still intact after U.S.-Iran exchange fire
summary_full: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Strait of Hormuz, raising fresh fears that the fragile ceasefire between the two countries was unraveling.
summary_public: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Strait of Hormuz, raising fresh fears that the fragile ceasefire between the two countries was unraveling.
